description.ko: 완벽한 흑요석 구조가 수학적인 파편과 디지털 글리치로 산산조각 나는 체계적인 혼돈을 표현합니다.
description.en: A representation of systematic chaos where a perfect obsidian structure shatters into a mathematical array of shards and digital glitches.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Obsidian Singularity.' A massive #1A1A1A matte black geometric monolith suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF void, undergoing a controlled architectural collapse. The structure shatters into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards that float in a state of suspended animation. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slice through the composition at precise angles. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes intersect with digital scanlines. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the cold elegance of mathematical chaos.
